page.title: Promotions
page.description: Discover our exclusive promotions and participate to win amazing prizes
page.no_promotions: No promotions available at this time

items.title: Ranchitas Promotion 2026
items.short_description: Participate and win amazing prizes with your favorite snacks
items.description: Buy your favorite Ranchitas, register your code and participate for incredible prizes. Every week we will raffle special prizes for our most loyal fans.
terms_and_conditions: Promotion valid from January 1 to December 31, 2026
You must be 18 years or older to participate
One code per person per day
Winners will be notified by email
how_to_participate: Find the unique code inside the package
Enter your code in the participation section

faqs.question: How can I participate?
faqs.answer: Buy any Ranchitas product, find the code inside the package and register it on our website.

faqs.question: When are winners announced?
faqs.answer: Winners are announced weekly and notified by email.

faqs.question: What prizes can I win?
faqs.answer: You can win from Ranchitas product kits to all-expenses-paid trips and video game consoles.

items.title: Ranchitas Summer 2025
items.short_description: Enjoy summer with Ranchitas and win unique experiences
items.description: This summer, Ranchitas took you to live unforgettable experiences. Participants bought their favorite products and won concert tickets, water park passes and much more.
terms_and_conditions: Promotion valid from June 1 to August 31, 2025
Selected products from the Ranchitas line participated
You must be 18 years or older to participate
Prizes are not transferable or exchangeable for cash

prizes.name: Concert tickets
prizes.description: VIP passes to the best summer concerts

prizes.name: Water park passes
prizes.description: Family tickets to the best parks

how_to_participate: Register your code on the website
Redeem your points for raffle tickets
Cross your fingers and wait to win!
